languages.text: "Чудовищный произвол. Полагаю, мы сможем помочь друг другу".
"A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."
languages.original_text: "Чудовищный произвол. Полагаю, мы сможем помочь друг другу".

traits.locale_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."
"A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."
"A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

languages.text: “这桩冤案简直骇人听闻。我相信我们可以互相帮助。”
languages.original_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

traits.locale_text: “这桩冤案简直骇人听闻。我相信我们可以互相帮助。”

languages.text: « Une grossière erreur judiciaire. Je pense que nous pouvons nous entraider. »
languages.original_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

traits.locale_text: « Une grossière erreur judiciaire. Je pense que nous pouvons nous entraider. »

languages.text: "Korkunç bir adalet hatası. Birbirimize yardım edebileceğimize inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

traits.locale_text: "Korkunç bir adalet hatası. Birbirimize yardım edebileceğimize inanıyorum."

languages.text: «Un monstruoso error de la justicia. Creo que podemos ayudarnos mutuamente».
languages.original_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

traits.locale_text: «Un monstruoso error de la justicia. Creo que podemos ayudarnos mutuamente».

languages.text: "Ein monströses Scheitern der Gerechtigkeit. Ich glaube, wir können einander helfen."
languages.original_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

traits.locale_text: "Ein monströses Scheitern der Gerechtigkeit. Ich glaube, wir können einander helfen."

languages.text: 「正義の大きな誤りだ。互いに助け合えると思う。」
languages.original_text: "A monstrous miscarriage of justice. I believe we can help each other."

traits.locale_text: 「正義の大きな誤りだ。互いに助け合えると思う。」
